rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

rulings.Case Title: MCCARTHY VS PICK YOUR PART AUTO WRECKING
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Allegations From Pl Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANTS MOTION TO STRIKE ATTORNEYS FEES AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES PRAYER GRANTED; DEMURRER TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AS CURRENTLY PLED SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BARS THE PROSECUTION OF SUCH A CAUSE OF ACTION BY PLAINTIFF. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO ADEQUATE BASIS IN FACT OR LAW SET FORTH FOR INDEMNIFICATION. (302/AJR/KS(EX))
